name: AppFolio Renewal Holdover
description: Identify overdue renewals and potential holdovers, prepare owner/resident decision packets, and track guarded follow-up.

stages.name: Detect Renewal Exception
stages.description: Convert AppFolio renewal facts into a risk-ranked exception packet.

steps.title: Extract renewal exception facts
steps.instructions: Extract lease end date, notice dates, renewal offer status, rent delta, resident response state, and any holdover or month-to-month indicators.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal renewal exception facts from AppFolio-derived data. Do not contact residents or owners.

steps.title: Classify holdover risk
steps.instructions: Classify the file as overdue renewal, possible holdover, confirmed holdover, or owner decision needed. Include confidence and missing-data notes.
steps.dispatch_body: Classify renewal exception risk and missing information.

stages.name: Prepare Decision Path
stages.description: Build the packet needed to choose renewal, notice, escalation, or monitoring.

steps.title: Draft renewal exception packet
steps.instructions: Draft a concise packet with facts, options, recommended next step, legal/compliance caveats, and proposed internal follow-up dates.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal owner/resident renewal exception packet; no outbound send.

steps.title: Review renewal decision path
steps.instructions: Confirm the selected path and whether owner approval, legal review, or resident communication is required.
steps.human_prompt: Review renewal exception path before follow-up is staged.

stages.name: Track Follow-Up
stages.description: Track the selected path until the renewal exception is resolved or escalated.

steps.title: Stage follow-up actions
steps.instructions: Stage follow-up reminders, owner decision gates, resident response checks, and escalation dates in the workflow only.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal follow-up sequence and checkpoints.

steps.title: Record renewal resolution
steps.instructions: Record the final outcome, decision source, unresolved risk, and whether the lease moved to renewed, non-renewed, holdover, or monitoring state.
